steps.response:
Here are the best hotel options I found in Barcelona for July 5–10 (5 nights) within your $150/night limit. I picked the top 3 that fit your budget and highlighted vegan- and accessibility-friendly features so you can pick the best fit.

1) Casa Jam Barcelona — Best-rated budget pick (4.7/5)
   - Price: $73 per night — Total: $365
   - Dates: 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-10
   - Rating: 4.7 (459 reviews)
   - Location: 41.4047637, 2.1597993 (Barcelona)
   - Amenities: Free Wi‑Fi; Parking ($); Air conditioning; Full-service laundry; Kid-friendly
   - Notes: Hip hostel with private rooms and a guest kitchen — great social vibe and good value.

2) The Central House Barcelona Gracia — Most vegan-/accessibility-friendly option
   - Price: $66 per night — Total: $331
   - Dates: 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-10
   - Rating: 4.4 (805 reviews)
   - Location: 41.3956116, 2.1583899 (Barcelona — Gracia)
   - Amenities: Breakfast ($); Free Wi‑Fi; Air conditioning; Kitchen in some rooms; Airport shuttle; Accessible; Kid-friendly
   - Notes: Shared kitchen and accessible facilities make this a great fit for a vegan traveler and for accessibility needs.

3) Bruc & Bruc — Private-room budget option close to your cap
   - Price: $143 per night — Total: $713
   - Dates: 2026-07-05 to 2026-07-10
   - Rating: 3.7 (143 reviews)
   - Location: 41.3964619, 2.1663277 (Barcelona)
   - Amenities: Free Wi‑Fi; Air conditioning; Airport shuttle; Kid-friendly
   - Notes: Higher per-night price but still within your $150/night limit; simpler property.

Summary & next steps:
- All three are available for your dates and stay under your $150/night limit.
- For vegan needs, The Central House stands out with kitchens in some rooms (easy for preparing vegan meals). Casa Jam also has a guest kitchen and the best rating/value.
- If you want me to book one of these, I can proceed to make a reservation or search for vegan-friendly restaurants and grocery/markets near the chosen hotel.

Which option would you like to book, or would you like more details (room types, exact address, or nearby vegan spots)?

APPROVE: Looks good overall — hotels match Barcelona, dates, traveler count and the $150/night (~$750 total) budget. A few small issues to double-check before booking: the Bruc & Bruc rating (3.7) looks low compared with typical listings — verify current ratings and review counts; confirm accessible-room details and vegan-friendly facilities (kitchen/meal options) for each property; and check extra fees (parking, breakfast, city tax). If those are confirmed, this set is appropriate.
